name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-1
title: Add test coverage for Inv 5-8 (rabbit-feature-touch seven-step / Step 4 / dispatcher-side / marker bypass)
description: After post-consolidation cleanup of dead absorbed tests, add focused new tests for: Inv 5 (Skill-tool invocation in normal-mode Step 1, not shelling out), Inv 6 (seven-step structure with every heading numbered), Inv 7 (Step 4 dispatcher-side gate lives in main session, not in subagent), Inv 8 (marker-based bypass actually passes --human-approval-gate false to dispatch). Update test-bug-9-inv10-coverage-meta.py to cover the renumbered spec correctly.
